validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: cd apps/web && npx vitest run src/components/support/__tests__ src/app/help-center/__tests__ src/app/help-center/search/__tests__ --reporter=verbose

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: cd apps/web && npx eslint src/components/support/ src/app/help-center/ src/components/sidebar/configs/help-center.ts

notes: PG-044 Help Search page implemented with TDD. Pure function search algorithm with weighted scoring, URL-driven state management, SearchFilters component, sidebar navigation entry, and a11y fixes for unconditional live region and aria-hidden on decorative icons. Pre-existing LeadScoringDashboard.tsx syntax error fixed to unblock build. Coverage: 98.21%/92.75%/93.54%/98.07%.
